title: The Missing Tape
content: You use an old contact to pull the first-responder's inventory from the night of Vane's death. It's handwritten and messy, but one item stands out.||Item 14: Voice recorder (Dictaphone). Found on desk.||In the final report signed by Miller, Item 14 is gone. Scrubbed from the record. Vane was a writer who recorded every interview. If that tape exists, it's the one thing that can't be explained away as a suicide.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Missing dictaphone noted.
